title: document_manifest.json -- case document roster v0.5
description: The list of every document in a case and its processing status. This is a shared state file updated by multiple stages in sequence, not a single component's output -- it does not use the common output envelope. Update discipline: each stage adds only its own owner fields and never modifies fields it doesn't own (owner is documented per field below). This discipline is enforced structurally by the DAO's write_contract lock (see harness-guardrails P5), not just by convention.

updated_at.description: owner: whichever stage last updated this file

pre_flagged_type.description: owner: Case Intake. Set when a document's type is already known at intake (e.g. an insurer-response document flagged during the source-ledger review) -- classification trusts this instead of running inference. null if not pre-flagged.

provisional_document_type.description: owner: Case Intake (segmentation). A PRE-OCR VISUAL GUESS carried over from segmentation_proposal_{source_document_id}.json, inferred from a cropped, downscaled contact-sheet cell. NOT authoritative and NOT a substitute for classification: document-pipeline's checkpoint 1 still owns document_type and must run its own inference against the real OCR'd text. Contrast pre_flagged_type directly above -- that one a human asserted, so classification trusts it and skips inference; this one a model guessed from a deliberately low-fidelity image, so it must not be wired into the same short-circuit. null for documents that did not come from a segmented bundle.

source_file_name.description: owner: Case Intake (segmentation). The bundle this logical document was split out of. null for a document intaken whole.

source_page_start.description: owner: Case Intake (segmentation). 1-based inclusive page in the source bundle. null for a document intaken whole. Provenance back to the immutable original is why the superseded bundle entry is retained rather than deleted.

source_page_end.description: owner: Case Intake (segmentation). 1-based inclusive. source_page_end >= source_page_start is enforced by the tool, not here -- JSON Schema cannot compare sibling values.

segmentation_proposal_path.description: owner: Case Intake (segmentation). Backpointer to the proposal that produced this entry, so an auditor can see which boundaries a human approved and what evidence the model gave.

ocr_status.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Initialized to pending by Case Intake.

ocr_quality.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Copied from ocr_result_{document_id}.json's summary. null before OCR. Detail (uncertain-region list/positions, cross-validation outcome) lives only in ocr_result_{document_id}.json -- this manifest stays a lightweight roster.

uncertain_region_count.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Sum of ocr_result_{document_id}.json's uncertain_regions for this document. null before OCR.

cross_validation_status.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Result of P8's dual-path (OCR engine vs. blind vision-model read) cross-validation. Mirrors ocr_result_{document_id}.json's own cross_validation_status enum -- found out of sync for real when a real resolution's write was correctly rejected by schema validation (this file hadn't been updated when 'disagreed_resolved' was added there).

document_type.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). null before classification (or copied directly from pre_flagged_type when pre-flagged).

classification_confidence.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). null before classification; null (not 1.0) when pre-flagged, since no inference confidence applies.

extraction_method.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). non_text_image is human-verified visual evidence that must not be converted into synthetic page text.

downstream_disposition.description: owner: document-pipeline, except superseded_bundle which is owned by Case Intake (segmentation). expert_review_only excludes the document from text redaction, chunking, and automated downstream evidence use. superseded_bundle marks a raw bundle that segmentation has replaced with per-document entries: it is excluded from every downstream stage but retained so provenance back to the immutable source survives. It is deliberately a separate value from expert_review_only, whose conditional below asserts a human verified photographic evidence -- a claim that is simply untrue of a superseded bundle, and encoding it that way would put a false human verification into the record.

then.description: A superseded bundle is never OCR'd or redacted as a whole -- its pages are processed through the DOC_XXX entries segmentation created. Requiring segmentation_proposal_path means an entry can only claim to be superseded if it points at the proposal that superseded it.
A page range never exists half-specified: a start without an end or a source file is unusable provenance.
